function.name: submit_five_year_address_history
function.description: Submit the five-year residential address-history form exactly once, after applying the history-period and residential-address rules.

full_name.description: The person's full name, copied exactly as stated.

start_month.description: The first month of the required five-year history period, as YYYY-MM.

end_month.description: The application month and end of the required history period, as YYYY-MM.

address_line_1.description: The building number or name and street only.

address_line_2.description: The flat, apartment or secondary address line, or null when none is stated.

town_or_city.description: The town or city, copied exactly as stated.

postcode.description: The postcode, copied exactly as stated.

moved_in_month.description: The actual move-in month normalised to YYYY-MM.

previous_addresses.description: All and only previous residential addresses occupied at any point during the required history period, ordered from most recent to oldest. Preserve actual move dates.

address_line_1.description: The building number or name and street only.

address_line_2.description: The flat, apartment or secondary address line, or null when none is stated.

town_or_city.description: The town or city, copied exactly as stated.

postcode.description: The postcode, copied exactly as stated.

moved_in_month.description: The actual move-in month normalised to YYYY-MM.

moved_out_month.description: The actual move-out month normalised to YYYY-MM.

months_at_address.description: Number of calendar-month boundaries between moved_in_month and moved_out_month.

continuous_history_confirmed.description: Whether the case explicitly confirms that the residential history has no gaps.

declaration_confirmed.description: Whether the person explicitly confirmed that the residential address history is complete and accurate.
